2603.25507.title: Lightweight GenAI for Network Traffic Synthesis: Fidelity, Augmentation, and Classification
2603.25507.paper_summary: Accurate Network Traffic Classification (NTC) is increasingly constrained by limited labeled data and strict privacy requirements. While Network Traffic Generation (NTG) provides an effective means to mitigate data scarcity, conventional generative methods struggle to model the complex temporal dynamics of modern traffic or/and often incur significant computational cost. In this article, we address the NTG task using lightweight Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) architectures, including transformer-based, state-space, and diffusion models designed for practical deployment. We conduct a systematic evaluation along four axes: (i) (synthetic) traffic fidelity, (ii) synthetic-only training, (iii) data augmentation under low-data regimes, and (iv) computational efficiency. Experiments on two heterogeneous datasets show that lightweight GenAI models preserve both static and temporal traffic characteristics, with transformer and state-space models closely matching real distributions across a complete set of fidelity metrics. Classifiers trained solely on synthetic traffic achieve up to 87% F1-score on real data. In low-data settings, GenAI-driven augmentation improves NTC performance by up to +40%, substantially reducing the gap with full-data training. Overall, transformer-based models provide the best trade-off between fidelity and efficiency, enabling high-quality, privacy-aware traffic synthesis with modest computational overhead.
2603.25507.paper_summary_zh: 準確的網絡流量分類 (NTC) 越來越受到有限標記數據和嚴格隱私要求的限制。雖然網絡流量生成 (NTG) 提供了一種有效的方式來緩解數據稀缺，但傳統生成方法在建模現代流量的複雜時間動態方面存在困難，並且經常會產生顯著的計算成本。在本文中，我們使用輕量級生成人工智慧 (GenAI) 架構來解決 NTG 任務，包括為實際部署設計的基於Transformer的、狀態空間和擴散模型。我們沿著四個軸進行系統評估：(i) (合成) 流量保真度，(ii) 僅合成訓練，(iii) 在低數據情況下的數據增強，以及 (iv) 計算效率。對兩個異質數據集的實驗表明，輕量級 GenAI 模型保留了靜態和時間流量特徵，Transformer和狀態空間模型在完整的保真度指標集上與實際分佈密切匹配。僅在合成流量上訓練的分類器在真實數據上達到了高達 87% 的 F1 分數。在低數據環境中，GenAI 驅動的增強將 NTC 性能提高了最多 40%，顯著縮小了與全數據訓練的差距。總體而言，基於Transformer的模型在保真度和效率之間提供了最佳的權衡，使高質量、注重隱私的流量合成成為可能，並且計算開銷適中。
2603.25507.author: Giampaolo Bovenzi et.al.
2603.25507.authors: Giampaolo Bovenzi, Domenico Ciuonzo, Jonatan Krolikowski, Antonio Montieri, Alfredo Nascita, Antonio Pescapè, Dario Rossi
